comment: Trainable opening courses. Drop a course JSON (laionchess.course.v1 OR a Create-exported laionchess.folded-opening.v1) into this folder and add an entry here to publish it as a lesson on the Openings board.

courses.name: Scotch Game
courses.desc: A direct weapon against 1...e5. Open the center on move 3 and develop with tempo.
